# TavernKeep Design System
**Auto-generated from Google Stitch · Project ID: 13251280368109688011**  
**Last Updated: 2026-04-01**

> ⚠️ **DO NOT HAND-EDIT THIS FILE**  
> This file is automatically generated from the Stitch design system.  
> All design tokens are the single source of truth for the application.

---

## Creative North Star: "The Mystical Archivist"

This design system moves away from the sterile, flat "SaaS" look and embraces the tactile, atmospheric world of high fantasy. The goal is to create a UI that feels like a living, enchanted artifact—an interface that could exist within a wizard's study or an ancient library.

We break the "template" look by using **Intentional Asymmetry** and **Tonal Depth**. By avoiding rigid, boxy layouts and utilizing overlapping elements with high-contrast typography scales, we evoke the feeling of hand-placed vellum and gold-leafed inscriptions.

---

## 1. Color Palette

### Mode
- **Color Mode**: `DARK`
- **Color Variant**: `FIDELITY`

### Primary Colors
```css
--primary: #ffc637;              /* Radiant gold - primary actions */
--primary-container: #e2aa00;    /* Darker gold - button gradients */
--primary-fixed: #ffdf9e;        /* Light gold - fixed elements */
--primary-fixed-dim: #fabd00;    /* Dimmed gold */
--on-primary: #3f2e00;           /* Text on primary (dark brown) */
--on-primary-container: #594100; /* Text on primary container */
--on-primary-fixed: #261a00;     /* Text on fixed primary */
--on-primary-fixed-variant: #5b4300;
```

### Secondary Colors
```css
--secondary: #c4c6cb;            /* Cool gray - secondary actions */
--secondary-container: #46494d;  /* Dark gray container */
--secondary-fixed: #e1e2e7;      /* Light gray fixed */
--secondary-fixed-dim: #c4c6cb;  /* Dimmed gray */
--on-secondary: #2e3135;         /* Text on secondary */
--on-secondary-container: #b6b8bd;
--on-secondary-fixed: #191c20;
--on-secondary-fixed-variant: #44474b;
```

### Tertiary Colors
```css
--tertiary: #ffc19e;             /* Warm peach - tertiary accents */
--tertiary-container: #f89c64;   /* Orange container */
--tertiary-fixed: #ffdbc9;       /* Light peach */
--tertiary-fixed-dim: #ffb68c;   /* Dimmed peach */
--on-tertiary: #532200;          /* Text on tertiary */
--on-tertiary-container: #723200;
--on-tertiary-fixed: #321200;
--on-tertiary-fixed-variant: #753401;
```

### Surface & Background
```css
--background: #111316;           /* Deep slate - app background */
--surface: #111316;              /* Base surface */
--surface-dim: #111316;          /* Dimmed surface */
--surface-bright: #37393d;       /* Bright surface */
--surface-container-lowest: #0c0e11;  /* Deepest container */
--surface-container-low: #1a1c1f;     /* Low container */
--surface-container: #1e2023;         /* Standard container */
--surface-container-high: #282a2d;    /* High container */
--surface-container-highest: #333538; /* Highest container */
--surface-variant: #333538;           /* Variant surface */
--surface-tint: #fabd00;              /* Gold tint */
```

### On-Surface Colors
```css
--on-background: #e2e2e6;        /* Text on background */
--on-surface: #e2e2e6;           /* Text on surface */
--on-surface-variant: #d0c5af;   /* Text on surface variant */
```

### Inverse Colors
```css
--inverse-surface: #e2e2e6;      /* Light surface for dark mode */
--inverse-on-surface: #2f3034;   /* Dark text for light surface */
--inverse-primary: #785900;      /* Dark gold for light mode */
```

### Outline & Borders
```css
--outline: #99907c;              /* Standard outline */
--outline-variant: #4d4635;      /* Subtle outline variant */
```

### Error States
```css
--error: #ffb4ab;                /* Error red */
--error-container: #93000a;      /* Error container */
--on-error: #690005;             /* Text on error */
--on-error-container: #ffdad6;   /* Text on error container */
```

### Custom Override Colors
```css
--override-primary: #FFC107;     /* Custom primary override */
--override-secondary: #2C2F33;   /* Custom secondary override */
--override-tertiary: #8B4513;    /* Custom tertiary override (saddle brown) */
--override-neutral: #121417;     /* Custom neutral override */
```

---

## 2. Typography

### Font Families
- **Headline Font**: `Noto Serif` — Authoritative, mystical serif for display and headlines
- **Body Font**: `Manrope` — Clean, geometric sans-serif for body text and labels
- **Label Font**: `Manrope` — Consistent with body for functional data

### Google Fonts Import
```css
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Noto+Serif:wght@400;600;700&family=Manrope:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap');
```

### Typography Scale

#### Display (Noto Serif)
```css
--display-lg: 57px / 64px, weight 400;  /* Epic page titles */
--display-md: 45px / 52px, weight 400;  /* Large headers */
--display-sm: 36px / 44px, weight 400;  /* Section headers */
```

#### Headline (Noto Serif)
```css
--headline-lg: 32px / 40px, weight 400; /* Major headings */
--headline-md: 28px / 36px, weight 400; /* Standard headings */
--headline-sm: 24px / 32px, weight 400; /* Subheadings */
```

#### Title (Manrope)
```css
--title-lg: 22px / 28px, weight 400;    /* Card titles, all-caps with 0.05rem spacing */
--title-md: 16px / 24px, weight 500;    /* List item titles */
--title-sm: 14px / 20px, weight 500;    /* Small titles */
```

#### Body (Manrope)
```css
--body-lg: 16px / 24px, weight 400;     /* Large body text */
--body-md: 14px / 20px, weight 400;     /* Standard body text */
--body-sm: 12px / 16px, weight 400;     /* Small body text */
```

#### Label (Manrope)
```css
--label-lg: 14px / 20px, weight 500;    /* Large labels */
--label-md: 12px / 16px, weight 500;    /* Standard labels */
--label-sm: 11px / 16px, weight 500;    /* Small labels */
```

### Typography Usage Guidelines
- **Display & Headlines**: Use `Noto Serif` for the "voice" of the interface. Large, airy, high-contrast.
- **Body & Labels**: Use `Manrope` for all functional data. Sharp, clean contrast to ornate headers.
- **Ledger-Entry Feel**: Titles (`title-lg`) should use `Manrope` in all-caps with `letter-spacing: 0.05rem`.

---

## 3. Spacing Scale

**Spacing Scale**: `3` (Moderate spacing)

### Spacing Values
```css
--spacing-0: 0px;
--spacing-1: 4px;
--spacing-2: 8px;
--spacing-3: 12px;
--spacing-4: 16px;
--spacing-5: 20px;
--spacing-6: 24px;
--spacing-7: 28px;
--spacing-8: 32px;
--spacing-9: 36px;
--spacing-10: 40px;
--spacing-12: 48px;
--spacing-16: 64px;
--spacing-20: 80px;
--spacing-24: 96px;
```

### Spacing Guidelines
- Use **spacing-8** and **spacing-10** to let the "parchment" breathe
- **Asymmetrical spacing**: Slightly larger top padding than bottom creates a "gravity" feel
- **Vertical white space**: Use spacing-4 or spacing-5 to separate content (NO 1px dividers)

---

## 4. Border Radius (Roundness)

**Roundness**: `ROUND_FOUR` (0.25rem / 4px)

```css
--radius-none: 0px;
--radius-sm: 0.125rem;   /* 2px */
--radius-md: 0.25rem;    /* 4px - primary roundness */
--radius-lg: 0.5rem;     /* 8px */
--radius-xl: 0.75rem;    /* 12px - cards */
--radius-2xl: 1rem;      /* 16px */
--radius-full: 9999px;   /* Fully rounded */
```

### Roundness Guidelines
- **Cards**: Use `radius-xl` (0.75rem) for a worn, angular feel
- **Buttons**: Use `radius-md` (0.25rem)
- **Input fields**: Use `radius-md` (0.25rem)

---

## 5. Elevation & Shadows

### The "No-Line" Rule
**Prohibit 1px solid borders for sectioning.** Use background color shifts or subtle tonal transitions instead.

### Surface Hierarchy
Treat the UI as a series of physical layers—like stacked sheets of heavy parchment or slabs of dark stone.

- **Lowest Tier** (`surface-container-lowest`): Recessed input fields, background wells
- **Base Tier** (`surface`): Primary canvas
- **Highest Tier** (`surface-container-highest`): Elevated floating cards, urgent notifications

### Shadow Tokens
```css
--shadow-ambient: 0 10px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);  /* Floating elements */
--shadow-soft: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);       /* Subtle lift */
--shadow-card: 0 4px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);      /* Card elevation */
```

### Glass & Gradient
- **Glassmorphism**: Use `surface-variant` with `backdrop-blur: 12px-20px` for floating elements
- **Gold Gradient**: Linear gradient from `primary` (#ffc637) top-left to `primary-container` (#e2aa00) bottom-right

### Ghost Border
If a container needs more definition, use a "Ghost Border":
```css
border: 1px solid rgba(77, 70, 53, 0.15); /* outline-variant at 15% opacity */
```

---

## 6. Component Patterns

### Buttons

#### Primary Button
```css
background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary) 0%, var(--primary-container) 100%);
color: var(--on-primary);
border-radius: var(--radius-md);
padding: 12px 24px;
```

#### Secondary Button
```css
background: transparent;
border: 1px solid rgba(77, 70, 53, 0.15); /* Ghost border */
color: var(--primary);
border-radius: var(--radius-md);
padding: 12px 24px;
```

#### Tertiary Button
```css
background: transparent;
border: none;
color: var(--primary);
padding: 12px 24px;
```

### Cards

#### Standard Card
```css
background: var(--surface-container-low);
border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
padding: var(--spacing-6);
box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 198, 55, 0.05); /* Subtle inner glow */
```

#### The Divider Ban
Strictly forbid 1px horizontal dividers. Use vertical white space (spacing-4 or spacing-5) to separate content.

### Input Fields

#### Container
```css
background: var(--surface-container-lowest);
border: 1px solid transparent;
border-radius: var(--radius-md);
padding: 12px 16px;
transition: border-color 200ms;
```

#### Focus State
```css
border-color: var(--primary); /* Solid gold glow */
```

### Signature Component: The "Enchanted Scroll"
A full-screen or half-screen modal using:
```css
background: var(--surface-variant);
backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
border-left: 2px solid var(--outline-variant);
```

---

## 7. Animation & Transitions

### Page Transitions
```css
transition: opacity 200ms ease-in-out;
```

### Item Cards
```css
/* Staggered entrance */
animation: slideUp 300ms ease-out;
animation-delay: calc(var(--index) * 50ms);

@keyframes slideUp {
  from {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(20px);
  }
  to {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateY(0);
  }
}
```

### Loading Skeletons
```css
background: linear-gradient(
  90deg,
  var(--surface-container-low) 0%,
  var(--surface-container) 50%,
  var(--surface-container-low) 100%
);
background-size: 200% 100%;
animation: shimmer 1.5s infinite;

@keyframes shimmer {
  0% { background-position: 200% 0; }
  100% { background-position: -200% 0; }
}
```

### QR Code Reveal
```css
animation: scaleIn 300ms ease-out;

@keyframes scaleIn {
  from {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: scale(0.8);
  }
  to {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: scale(1);
  }
}
```

---

## 8. Design Philosophy & Rules

### Do's
- ✅ Use asymmetrical spacing (larger top padding than bottom for "gravity")
- ✅ Use `primary` sparingly—it should feel like gold leaf, rare and precious
- ✅ Utilize the full typography scale for "Editorial" high-end look
- ✅ Use tonal layering instead of shadows for elevation
- ✅ Apply glassmorphism for floating elements (modals, dropdowns)

### Don'ts
- ❌ Never use pure black (#000000)—always use `surface` tokens
- ❌ Never use standard Material Design "elevated" shadows
- ❌ Never crowd the interface—use spacing-8 and spacing-10 generously
- ❌ Never use 1px solid borders for sectioning
- ❌ Never use 1px horizontal dividers in lists

### Accessibility
- Ensure all `primary` gold text on `surface` backgrounds meets WCAG AA standards
- If contrast is too low, shift toward `tertiary` (#ffc19e) or `primary-fixed-dim` (#fabd00)

---

## 9. Rarity Badge Colors

```css
--rarity-common: #6b7280;      /* Gray */
--rarity-uncommon: #10b981;    /* Green */
--rarity-rare: #3b82f6;        /* Blue */
--rarity-very-rare: #8b5cf6;   /* Purple */
--rarity-legendary: #f59e0b;   /* Orange */
```

---

## 10. Mobile-First Considerations

- **Minimum width**: 375px
- **Touch targets**: Minimum 44×44px
- **No hover-only interactions** on player-facing views
- **QR share page**: Full-bleed, no chrome, single tap to copy URL
- **Player shop view**: Single-column card scroll, sticky shopkeeper header
- **Test widths**: 375px, 390px, 428px

---

---

## 12. Implementation Checklist

When implementing a new screen or component:

- [ ] Check Stitch for existing screen design
- [ ] Extract HTML as pixel-perfect reference
- [ ] Use only colors from this DESIGN.md
- [ ] Use only typography tokens from this DESIGN.md
- [ ] Use only spacing values from this DESIGN.md
- [ ] Apply "No-Line" rule (no 1px borders for sectioning)
- [ ] Apply "Divider Ban" (no horizontal dividers)
- [ ] Use tonal layering for elevation
- [ ] Ensure WCAG AA contrast compliance
- [ ] Test on mobile (375px, 390px, 428px)

---

**End of Design System**
